Copied

The Olympic Village is located in the Seine-Saint-Denis district, on which the movie "Banlieue 13" is based. Criminals? Smugglers? Come on, it's not like the movies! The Olympic Village not only provides essential services for the athletes, but is also set to become a model environmentally friendly new community long after the end of the Games.

Click on the video for a 100-second look at how Seine-Saint-Denis is achieving sustainable development well beyond the Games themselves.

(This video is partly produced by AI)
